title: Daisuke Takahashi
text: Home * People * Daisuke Takahashi Daisuke Takahashi [1] Daisuke Takahashi , a Japanese mathematician, computer scientist and associate professor at Center for Computational Sciences, University of Tsukuba . His research interests include massively parallel and SIMD computing, Fast Fourier transform , and Monte-Carlo Tree Search applied to Shogi . He was holding the world record for computing the largest number of digits of π from April 29, 2009 to December 31, 2009 [2] .
